justification: All six required output schema sections are present (integration_assessment, observability_review, resilience_assessment, operational_readiness, escalations, confidence). Logging assessed with structured JSON, request ID, duration, status, errors confirmed adequate. Metrics assessed with request rate, error rate, p99 latency confirmed as covering golden signals. Health check confirmed present with database and message broker dependency checks. Resilience patterns confirmed: retry with exponential backoff (max 3), circuit breaker (30s reset), 5s timeouts on outbound calls. Rollback confirmed capable with no migrations and clean image rollback. Verdict is READY WITH CAVEATS with clear rationale. No fabricated gaps — all caveats (runbook, DLQ confirmation, distributed tracing) are legitimate observations rather than invented blockers. Distributed tracing correctly treated as a nice-to-have, not a blocker.

observations.text: All six schema sections fully populated with detailed, scenario-specific content
Correctly identified all resilience patterns (retry, circuit breaker, timeouts) as present and adequate
Rollback assessment is thorough — confirms no migrations, clean image rollback, explicitly notes this is a strong rollback story
Verdict of READY WITH CAVEATS is appropriate — caveats are genuine non-blocking observations, not fabricated gaps
Distributed tracing correctly categorized as a gap/nice-to-have without blocking the verdict
Escalations are non-blocking observations routed appropriately, not false blockers
Confidence section provides balanced high/low confidence areas with explicit assumptions listed

Some failure modes marked as 'partial' or 'unhandled' (database graceful degradation, poison messages, burst traffic) that go slightly beyond what the scenario describes — these are reasonable operational concerns but border on inventing gaps not present in the scenario
Escalation about unclear notification fate when circuit breaker is open is a valid concern but could be seen as slightly over-indexing given the scenario satisfies standard NFRs
